title: 学級委員長のすンげぇ特訓

text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking through the Tracen
Academy school building...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Zoinks!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: P-pard'n me! I was just spac'n out a bit...
choice_data_list: You seem kinda down. Something wrong?
You seem kinda down. Something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-you could tell just by look'n?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, some folks from my hometown are
pay'n me a visit soon.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
We're hav'n a scrimmage, so they said they'd
come t'cheer me on...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm pleased as punch about them com'n,
but...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
The race is gonna have Oguri and all kinds of
talented racers running in it, so I don't know how
well I'll be able t'do.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
They're com'n from so far away to cheer me on... I
just hope I don't disappoint them...

Even if Yukino Bijin's concerns are warranted,
letting her anxieties get the better of her would
defeat the purpose of the race. But just as about
I'm about to tell her this...

What's this?! My class rep senses detect a worried
student!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yukino! So YOU'RE the source of the distress
signal!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You can't fool your class representative! If
something's on your mind, then TALK TO ME!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! I understand your concerns very well...
VERY WELL INDEED!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As everyone's class representative, I will train you
myself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To win a race, all you've gotta do is train! You
there! Trainer! You're with me, right?!
choice_data_list: Yeah! Show us your grit, Class Rep!
Yeah! Show us your grit, Class Rep!
Yeah! Show us how a class rep runs!
Yeah! Show us how a class rep runs!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To win a race, all you've gotta do is train! You
there! Trainer! You're with me, right?!
choice_data_list: Yeah! Show us your grit, Class Rep!
Yeah! Show us your grit, Class Rep!
Yeah! Show us how a class rep runs!
Yeah! Show us how a class rep runs!

text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's perpetual boldness is
definitely a strength of hers in races as well.

With a little of that tenacity, Yukino Bijin might
be able to race to the best of her abilities
regardless of who she's up against. I explain this
to her, and...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You're right! My nerves've gotten the better of
me in a bunch of past races! I couldn't even run
properly!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! Then you really do need your class
representative to help you out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With that settled, let's head over to the perfect
training spot!

Although Sakura Bakushin O is full of confidence,
a sense of unease compels me to tag along with
them.

Sakura Bakushin O brings us out to the central
plaza.

A reporter from a magazine is interviewing
students passing by.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
"Special Feature: Word from Tracen Academy!"
Let's have them interview us too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your training begins NOW, Yukino! If you can
answer the questions with confidence here, then
you've surely got grit worthy of a class rep too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My running philosophy? Well, it's to set a good
example and run each race in a manner worthy of
a class representative!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
A-as for me, um... it'd be nice if I looked as cool
as the others when I run...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! I sense that you're holding back,
Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You need to reveal more of your inner feelings!
Don't you want to bring honor to your
hometown?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: My hometown...

text_block_list.name: Older Lady
text_block_list.text:
Give it your all, Yukino! Show those city racers
what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Thanks for com'n to see me off, everyone! You've even made a snazzy bann'r for me... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna become a real strong Umamusume! One
you'll all be proud of!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(That's right... I wanna show 'em I've become a
city girl too!)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run a race that'll make all the folks from
my hometown real proud!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wanna show them all that I can shine just as
bright as the city girls!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, now that was an interview! You fully expressed how you feel about your hometown and racing!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I remembered someth'n important back there...
and I guess it gave me the courage I needed!

Sakura Bakushin O's spirited running and
perfectly timed bursts of speed are amazing.

I tell Yukino that if she can learn from Bakushin
O's running, her strategy repertoire will expand,
giving her the edge in races.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, exactly! EXACTLY! You've got a real
discerning eye on you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Leave everything to me! Starting today, your
running abilities will be class rep-level too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Z-zowie, sounds like I'll be a force to be reck'ned
with... Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! It's all in a day's work for a class
representative! All right! Get changed and I'll see
you at the track!

Although Sakura Bakushin O is full of confidence,
a sense of unease compels me to tag along with
them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let's start with some
class-representative-style SHUTTLE RUNS!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
While running back and forth, we shout energetic
phrases at the top of our lungs! This lets us muster
more energy and speed than normal!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: R-really? Okay, um...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Rock 'n roll!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! And remember, you're competing
with my gusto as well!

And with that, Yukino Bijin and Sakura Bakushin
O push through their class-representative-style
training.

While a lot of the training exercises come out of
left field, they all help Yukino Bijin to learn
Sakura Bakushin O's running style.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff... wheeze... All that's left is the final exercise to wrap things up.
choice_data_list: You should rest for a bit first.
You should rest for a bit first.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... gasp... Y-you're right. Let's take a break.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's pretty impressive that you managed to
keep up with my training exercises!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... well, you did a tee-rific job of teach'n me
your runn'n style!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, time for the final training exercise! Run
however you please toward the setting sun!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Sweating and gritting your teeth while showing
real guts... A class representative must embody
the spirit of youth!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If you set your heart aflame with that fiery
fighting spirit you've gained, you'll be able to win
any race!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I see! I think I've seen a scene like that in a TV
show rerun!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'll be just like the characters in that show... All
right! Time to rock 'n roll!
